title: Shaun Flaherty
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Shaun Flaherty''' wrote the backstory of [[Nobot/Legends|Nobot]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the [[What's The Story?]] feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

His alias is ''Jedi Flaherty'' on [[StarWars.com]].
